entity.label: Beth-gamul
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Camel-house, a city in the “plain country” of Moab denounced by the prophet (Jer. 48:23); probably the modern Um-el-Jemal, near Bozrah, one of the deserted cities of the Hauran.

nodes.label: Beth-gamul
nodes.description: Camel-house, a city in the “plain country” of Moab denounced by the prophet (Jer. 48:23); probably the modern Um-el-Jemal, near Bozrah, one of the deserted cities of the Hauran.

verses.text: And upon Kiriathaim, and upon Bethgamul, and upon Bethmeon,
